BRAND STORYTELLING✦CREATIVE DIRECTION✦SOCIAL CONTENT✦IP BUILDING✦DIGITAL CAMPAIGNS✦CONTENT STRATEGY✦BRAND STORYTELLING✦CREATIVE DIRECTION✦SOCIAL CONTENT✦IP BUILDING✦DIGITAL CAMPAIGNS✦CONTENT STRATEGY✦

02 — About

WHO I AM

Hi, I'm Debroop. Pull up a chair.

I grew up skipping cricket matches and Bollywood films to watch Anime and Cartoon Network — and to obsess over Fevicol, Cadbury, and Coca-Cola ads. Not because I loved brands. Because I loved how they made a connect with Indian people. That instinct turned into a career.

Over 8 years, I've worked at the crossroads of culture, storytelling, and strategy — building IPs that reshaped content platforms, launching films, collaborating with governments, and creating campaigns that connected with real people and delivered real results.

Beyond the briefs and decks, I'm someone who makes cocktails, loves Anime, hunts for good music, appreciates mural art, travels whenever possible, and is genuinely excited about what AI is doing to creativity.

Currently Open ToCreative Director roles · Brand collaborations · Consulting
AT A GLANCE
📍 Hyderabad, India — Working Globally
🎓 PGDM — ISB&M Pune · BBA — BIT Mesra
🗣️ English · Hindi · Bengali
🎯 8 yrs · 4 awards · 150M+ views

What I'm into

"The best storytelling I've ever seen comes from Japan — not Hollywood."
🎵
MUSIC
"Genre doesn't matter. If it makes me feel something, it's in the playlist."
🎨
MURAL ART
"There's no better canvas than a wall that everyone walks past."
✈️

"Every city I've been to has given me a campaign idea I still haven't used."
🤖
AI & TECH
"AI doesn't replace the idea. It gets you to the bad ones faster — so you find the good one."

03 — Experience

THE JOURNEY

2025–26
Brand Strategy Lead
Humans of Bombay · Aug 2025 – Jan 2026
  • End-to-end creative & campaign strategy for AWS, Samsung, Aditya Birla Group
  • Creative roadmap for All India Mehfil & Like an Athlete IPs
  • Pioneered white-label content solutions for brand-owned channels
AWSSamsungAditya BirlaAll India Mehfil
2024–25
Creative Director
TheSmallBigIdea · Nov 2024 – June 2025
  • Digital mandates for Warner Bros. India — Mickey 17, Final Destination, Minecraft, Comic Con BLR
  • Creative vision for EVA Live & Nick Jr. community growth
  • Meme-led campaigns + experiential activations driving viral engagement
Warner Bros.FilmfareFeminaNick Jr.EVA Live
2024
Associate Creative Director
1702 Digital · Mar 2024 – Oct 2024
  • Social strategies for Poonawalla Fincorp, ICICI Prudential, Fortune Oil
  • Won competitive pitches — Health & Glow, Kohinoor Basmati, SBI Securities
  • Built creative team from scratch; introduced AI-driven workflows
Poonawalla FincorpICICI PrudentialAI Workflows
2019–24
Associate Director → Sr. Creative Strategist
Fork Media Group · Feb 2019 – Jan 2024 · 5 Years
  • Led creative strategy for 6 digital brands across India & UAE: Mashable, Curly Tales, Hauterrfly, IGN, AskMen
  • Built & scaled IPs: Mashable Mornings (60M+ views), The Bombay Journey (Gold SCREENXX), Sunday Brunch, Tere Gully Mein
  • Directed Vatika Voices — Gold Digital MENA Award · 5.2M+ views · 1,000+ women empowered
  • Spearheaded Fork Media Group corporate rebrand
Mashable IndiaCurly TalesSamsungLexusGold MENA Award
2017–19
Education & Early Career
PGDM — ISB&M Pune · BBA — BIT Mesra
  • Internship: Times Now — News research & political analysis
  • Internship: 9XM — Market research & media insights
  • Internship: SML ISUZU — Sales operations & field support
Times Now9XMSML ISUZU

04 — Case Studies

WORK THAT HIT

MASHABLE
MORNINGSFLAGSHIP IP
Original IP · Mashable India
Mashable Mornings
60 MN+ VIEWS
The Brief
Build a show that captures the human side of Indian entrepreneurship.
The Insight
Audiences want struggle, honesty, and the hustle behind the pitch — not just success stories.
The Idea
A bi-weekly IP pairing intimate conversations with CEOs and founders during a drive through their city. Featured Nikhil Kamath, Vineeta Singh, Ankur Warikoo, Ghazal Alagh and more.
The Impact
60M+ views. Brand collaborations with Mercedes-Benz and Coworks. Expanded into the Middle East.
02
Original IP · Fork Media
The Bombay Journey
Gold SCREENXX Award
Popular Talk Show celebrating Mumbai's spirit.
03
Original IP · HOB
All India Mehfil
2025 · HOB
Soulful music podcast with Benny Dayal, Shankar Mahadevan & Anoushka Shankar.
04
Original IP · Fork Media
Tere Gully Mein
Hyperlocal Stories
Street-first content discovering India's hidden cultural lanes.
05
Original IP · Fork Media
Sunday Brunch
Lifestyle IP
Curly Tales lifestyle IP exploring the best weekend experiences.
06
Original IP · Fork Media
History on Wheels
Heritage & Travel
Travel series uncovering India's historical destinations.
CREATORS
JAMHERO CASE
Branded Content · Samsung × Jaipur Lit Fest
Creators Jam — Galaxy Tab S9
50 MN+ VIEWS
The Brief
Establish Samsung Galaxy Tab S9 as the go-to creative tool for artists.
The Insight
Today's creators thrive on collaboration where expression meets interaction.
The Idea
5-day art installation at Jaipur Literature Fest — 2 artists daily jamming live using the Tab S9. Genre-themed days: horror, AR, fantasy, fashion, time travel. 10 artists including Santanu Hazarika, Archana Kochhar, Neelesh Misra.
The Impact
50M+ views. S-Pen, AI tools and 3D editing showcased through real-time collaborative creation.
02
Branded Content · Mashable India
Innovation Powered by You
5.3 MN+ VIEWS
5-part series humanising Accenture's commitment to sustainability.
03
Branded Content · Fork Studios
NEXA S-Cross
Creator-led Road Trip
Three expert travellers living out of the S-Cross across terrains.
04
Branded Content · Mashable ME
Women of Progress
Franklin Templeton UAE
4-part series spotlighting Emirati women reshaping success.
05
Digital Strategy
ELLITE 50 Most Influential Indians
NYC · Statue of Liberty
End-to-end digital strategy for ELLITE Magazine's 2023 NYC event.
VATIKA
VOICESGOLD MENA AWARD
Influencer Campaign · Vatika Arabia × Curly Tales Dubai
Vatika Voices
5.2 MN+ VIEWS · GOLD MENA
The Brief
Position Vatika as a trusted partner in the growth journey of women across the Middle East.
The Insight
Women seek not just inspiration but tangible paths to progress.
The Idea
4,000+ submissions. 1,000 women shortlisted. 4-day bootcamp with 25+ hours of mentoring. 22-episode video series. Community microsite.
The Impact
5.2M+ views · 400K+ engagements · Gold at Digital MENA Awards · Season 2 launched 2022.
02
Influencer · Saudi Tourism × Curly Tales ME
Our Saudi
10 MN+ VIEWS
Kamiya Jani with local hosts across Riyadh, Abha, AlUla and Jeddah.
03
Influencer · MP Tourism × Curly Tales
MP Ki Galliyon Mein
10-Part Series
Siddharth Allambayan explores MP through locals across Ujjain, Ratlam, Orchha.
DURGOTSAVSCREENXX WINNER
Social Media · Bingo Tedhe Medhe
Durgotsav
Best Use of Social Media by a Brand
The Brief
Create culturally resonant social engagement for Bingo Tedhe Medhe during Durga Puja.
The Insight
Durga Puja isn't just a festival — it's a cultural identity. Brands that lean in authentically win hearts.
The Idea
A social-first campaign blending the energy of Durgotsav with Bingo's playful brand personality.
The Impact
SCREENXX Award Winner — Best Use of Social Media by a Brand.
02
Social Media · MOJ App × Mashable India
The Creators' Room
Content Series
Decoded the creative process of MOJ's top creators in long-form branded series.
03
Social Media · Nick Jr. India
Nick Jr. IP Launches
Motu Patlu · Chikoo Bunty
Social launch strategy for Nick Jr.'s flagship IPs.
04
Social Media · EVA Live
EVA Live Community
Organic Growth Strategy
Built and grew EVA Live's digital community from the ground up.
INDIA
IN MOTIONGOVERNMENT OF INDIA
Government Collab · Doordarshan × Curly Tales India
India In Motion
3.7 MN+ VIEWS
The Brief
Showcase India's transformation across road, rail, and air infrastructure.
The Insight
Mobility is the driving force behind India's next chapter of growth.
The Idea
A 3-part video series for the Government of India, hosted by Kamiya Jani — Railways, Roadways, Airways. From Vande Bharat to UDAN scheme.
The Impact
3.7M+ views. Positioned mobility as a catalyst for India's economic growth.
02
Government · DD National × Curly Tales
Dharohar Bharath Ki
DD National + Jio Cinemas
Shared by PM, Home Minister & Railway Minister on official handles.

Mickey 17
VIRAL PREMIERE ACTIVATION
The Brief
Create engagement at the premiere of Mickey 17 across movie theatres in India.
The Insight
Mickey 17's existential premise — a disposable worker reborn — mirrors everyday office burnout perfectly.
The Idea
A meme-led campaign drawing parallels with office burnout culture. A "Mickey takeover" at the premiere with masked guests sparked reel-worthy viral moments.
The Impact
Viral engagement across platforms. Premiere activation became a content moment in itself.
02
Film · Warner Bros. India
Final Destination Bloodlines
Digital Launch
Digital launch strategy for Final Destination Bloodlines in India.
03
Film · Warner Bros. India
Minecraft Movie
Social Campaign
Social-first film launch campaign for Minecraft, Warner Bros. India.
04
Experiential · Warner Bros. India
Comic Con Bangalore
On-Ground Activation
Experiential activation at Comic Con Bangalore.

07 — Skills

HOW I THINK

I don't just make content. I build systems that make brands mean something. Here's how I approach the work that matters.

🧭
Brand Strategy
"A brand without a point of view is just a logo."
Long-term brand planning, positioning, identity building. I work backwards from culture to strategy — not the other way around.
🎬
Creative Direction
"The best brief is a feeling, not a document."
End-to-end creative direction across video, digital, social and experiential. I lead with instinct, refine with insight.
📺
IP & Platform Building
"The shows people keep coming back to aren't made for brands — they're made for people."
Original IP development and content platform strategy. Built shows that outlived their campaign budgets.
📱
Social & Community
"Virality is a side effect of relevance, not a goal."
Platform-native content, community strategy, influencer and creator collaborations across India and the Middle East.
🤝
Business & Pitches
"A pitch isn't a presentation. It's a conversation starter."
New business development, pitch leadership, white-label solutions and retainer management across categories.
🤖
AI & Creative Ops
"AI doesn't replace the idea. It just gets you to the bad ones faster."
AI-driven workflows, data-led storytelling, trend spotting and GenAI solutions for content at scale.

08 — Beyond Work

BEYOND THE BRIEF

Most people close the portfolio after the case studies. This is for the ones who stay. This is the guy behind the work.

"Favourite bartender in the house — officially certified by everyone who's had my drinks."
